heading: Tonight
text: Some evening clouds northeast, then mostly clear and chilly. Lows in the 20s to low 30s, a few colder mountain valleys north near 20. Winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Sun, mixing with some clouds northeast. Clouds increasing in the afternoon from the Hudson Valley and Berkshires, north to I-89 by late. Highs in the 50s. Winds light, becoming east less than 10 mph.

heading: Saturday Night
text: Becoming partly cloudy from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north. Periods of clouds south, thicker toward the MA border, with a chance a shower in northern MA. Lows in the low to mid 30s, upper 20s in the cold spots. Winds east to southeast less than 10 mph, near calm in sheltered valleys.

heading: Sunday
text: Some morning clouds south giving way to increasing sun. Variable sun and clouds north, more clouds through NH. Highs in the 50s. Winds light and variable.
